description: The Boxoffice Company provides movie, theater, and showtime data products and related services for cinemas, studios, and digital platforms. Its public web presence also includes Boxoffice Pro industry media and company product pages.
summary: boxoffice.com exposes two public MCP servers at `https://chatgpt-mcp.boxoffice.com/mcp` and `https://mcp-regal.boxoffice.com/mcp`; no public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found on the domain.
